message:
feat(fs): add mmap for large files, fsAppend, auto-mkdir, remove debug logging

- Add mmap-based reading for files >1MB with platform optimizations
- Add fsAppend binding for fs.appendFileSync
- Auto-create parent directories on write/rename/copy operations
- Add fd write fallback for TypeScript sys.writeFile compatibility
- Add --external flags to bun build for Node.js core modules
- Remove all debug print statements from native bindings and polyfills
